Architecture LI 11 469
In the centre of the diagram Brahman occupies nine compart-
ments; to his east there is Aryaman (in three squares); next to the
right of Aryaman there is Savitr in a single square at an interval of
one division; next to him to the right is Vivasvat; next to him is
Indra; then going up to the west of Brahman there are Mitra (in 3
divisions) and Rajayaksman; then turning to the east, there are
Prthvldhara (in 3) and Apavatsa.
